## Meeting Purpose

[Hiring manager screen for Technical Managing Editor role at growthx.ai](https://fathom.video/share/fFjyrsGy5mxw9F7w6fkda9hxXyFb-9T2?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [growthx.ai is building innovative AI-powered content creation tools and workflows](https://fathom.video/share/fFjyrsGy5mxw9F7w6fkda9hxXyFb-9T2?tab=summary&timestamp=284.0)
  - [Role involves defining processes, managing pipelines, and balancing quality/efficiency](https://fathom.video/share/fFjyrsGy5mxw9F7w6fkda9hxXyFb-9T2?tab=summary&timestamp=290.0)
  - [Company culture emphasizes problem-solving, tool agnosticism, and adapting to rapid change](https://fathom.video/share/fFjyrsGy5mxw9F7w6fkda9hxXyFb-9T2?tab=summary&timestamp=425.0)
  - [Candidate has strong background in content strategy, SEO, and building editorial processes](https://fathom.video/share/fFjyrsGy5mxw9F7w6fkda9hxXyFb-9T2?tab=summary&timestamp=508.0)

## Topics

### Company Overview and Role Context

  - [Matthew is Chief Content Officer, focused on content quality and pipeline improvements](https://fathom.video/share/fFjyrsGy5mxw9F7w6fkda9hxXyFb-9T2?tab=summary&timestamp=268.0)
  - [Company builds AI tools for efficient, high-quality content creation for clients](https://fathom.video/share/fFjyrsGy5mxw9F7w6fkda9hxXyFb-9T2?tab=summary&timestamp=284.0)
  - [Role involves defining processes, managing pipelines, balancing quality and efficiency](https://fathom.video/share/fFjyrsGy5mxw9F7w6fkda9hxXyFb-9T2?tab=summary&timestamp=290.0)
  - [Culture emphasizes problem-solving, tool agnosticism, adapting to rapid change](https://fathom.video/share/fFjyrsGy5mxw9F7w6fkda9hxXyFb-9T2?tab=summary&timestamp=425.0)

### Candidate Background

  - [Extensive experience in SEO, content strategy, and editorial management](https://fathom.video/share/fFjyrsGy5mxw9F7w6fkda9hxXyFb-9T2?tab=summary&timestamp=522.0)
  - [Built processes and trained teams at Blue Shark Digital, U.S. News, Forbes](https://fathom.video/share/fFjyrsGy5mxw9F7w6fkda9hxXyFb-9T2?tab=summary&timestamp=526.0)
  - [Led successful content initiatives, including launching USA Today's Blueprint](https://fathom.video/share/fFjyrsGy5mxw9F7w6fkda9hxXyFb-9T2?tab=summary&timestamp=759.0)
  - [Strong track record of optimizing content workflows and driving revenue growth](https://fathom.video/share/fFjyrsGy5mxw9F7w6fkda9hxXyFb-9T2?tab=summary&timestamp=787.0)

### AI and Content Creation Approach

  - [Company built custom tool (Atlas) to replace limitations of third-party workflow tools](https://fathom.video/share/fFjyrsGy5mxw9F7w6fkda9hxXyFb-9T2?tab=summary&timestamp=1228.0)
  - [Pipelines handle research, drafting, fact-checking, metadata creation](https://fathom.video/share/fFjyrsGy5mxw9F7w6fkda9hxXyFb-9T2?tab=summary&timestamp=1347.0)
  - [Content managers edit/polish AI-generated content in 5-8 minutes](https://fathom.video/share/fFjyrsGy5mxw9F7w6fkda9hxXyFb-9T2?tab=summary&timestamp=1472.0)
  - [Can generate client content for full week on Monday mornings, freeing time for strategy](https://fathom.video/share/fFjyrsGy5mxw9F7w6fkda9hxXyFb-9T2?tab=summary&timestamp=1516.0)

### Innovative Project Example

  - [Built directory of AI voice agents for client in 2 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/fFjyrsGy5mxw9F7w6fkda9hxXyFb-9T2?tab=summary&timestamp=1721.0)
  - [Integrated live demo functionality using client's API](https://fathom.video/share/fFjyrsGy5mxw9F7w6fkda9hxXyFb-9T2?tab=summary&timestamp=1732.0)
  - [Demonstrates rapid, cost-effective execution of complex content projects](https://fathom.video/share/fFjyrsGy5mxw9F7w6fkda9hxXyFb-9T2?tab=summary&timestamp=1743.0)

### AI Tools and Industry Perspective

  - [Candidate advocates for AI adoption, sees it as crucial for future of content](https://fathom.video/share/fFjyrsGy5mxw9F7w6fkda9hxXyFb-9T2?tab=summary&timestamp=1813.0)
  - [Uses ChatGPT, Perplexity, Claude; familiar with Jasper, Zapier](https://fathom.video/share/fFjyrsGy5mxw9F7w6fkda9hxXyFb-9T2?tab=summary&timestamp=1929.0)
  - [Believes AI allows focus on higher-value work by automating mundane tasks](https://fathom.video/share/fFjyrsGy5mxw9F7w6fkda9hxXyFb-9T2?tab=summary&timestamp=2031.0)
  - [Emphasizes importance of hands-on experience to understand AI's potential](https://fathom.video/share/fFjyrsGy5mxw9F7w6fkda9hxXyFb-9T2?tab=summary&timestamp=2166.0)

## Next Steps

  - Marilia to schedule follow-up interview with Andy
  - Candidate to direct any additional questions to Marilia
  - Company to continue evaluation process for Technical Managing Editor role
